# Dave Kwiatkowski

> Runner, writer, and software engineer.

Dave Kwiatkowski is an ultra-runner, software engineer, and creator of https://yardlore.com. He writes on his Substack at https://davekwiatkowski.substack.com and documents his ultra-running races, adventures, and Fastest Known Times (FKTs).

## Site Structure

- [About](https://davekwiatkowski.com/#/about): Biography, photo, and introduction
- [Blog](https://davekwiatkowski.com/#/blog): Latest writing from Substack — essays on running, life, and adventure
- [Runs](https://davekwiatkowski.com/#/runs): Complete log of ultra-running races, backyard ultras, FKTs, and adventures with dates, locations, distances, durations, and results

## Links

- Website: https://davekwiatkowski.com
- Blog (Substack): https://davekwiatkowski.substack.com
- Blog RSS: https://davekwiatkowski.substack.com/feed

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://davekwiatkowski.com/llms-full.txt): Extended version with full site content and structured data
